description.en: Attacks an enemy, and has a <color=#28d9ed>100%</color> chance to reduce <color=#28d9ed>Priority</color> of the target by <color=#28d9ed>30%</color>.
description.jp: 敵単体にダメージを与え、<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>の確率で対象の<color=#28d9ed>行動ゲージ</color>を<color=#28d9ed>-30%</color>DOWNさせる。
description.kr: 적을 공격하고 <color=#28d9ed>100%</color> 확률로 대상의 <color=#28d9ed>행동 게이지</color>를 <color=#28d9ed>-30%</color> 감소시킵니다.
description.zh: 攻击敌人,并有<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>的几率使目标<color=#28d9ed>行动值</color>降低<color=#28d9ed>-30%</color>。
